narrative:
Scioto Twp township has 3,222 registered voters, with 48.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.3 percentage points.
